title: coreopsis teotepecensis
intro: Coreopsis teotepecensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow daisy-like flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coreopsis teotepecensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis teotepecensis are typically made from the flowers and leaves, which can be dried, infused in hot water, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
